pilot_phases.name: Foundation & Critical Control

tasks.pilot_purpose: Verify all dependencies install, data downloads, checkpoints load
tasks.pass_criteria: All deps install; DATE-LM loads; Pythia-70M and Pythia-1B load; dummy eval returns valid metric
tasks.fail_action: Debug dependency issues; try alternative package versions; check disk space

tasks.pilot_purpose: Validate RepSim + TRAK pipeline produces valid LDS; confirm RepSim > TRAK sanity check
tasks.pass_criteria: RepSim LDS > TRAK LDS; both in [0, 1]; runtime < 15 min each
tasks.fail_action: Check DATE-LM API; verify representation extraction; debug TRAK random projection

tasks.pilot_purpose: CRITICAL: Test H6 (FM1/FM2 independent of Hessian quality). K-FAC IF on Pythia-70M vs RepSim.
tasks.pass_criteria: K-FAC IF LDS < RepSim LDS - 5pp (H6 not falsified)
tasks.falsification_criteria: K-FAC IF LDS >= RepSim LDS - 5pp → PIVOT to cand_b
tasks.fail_action: If H6 falsified: document evidence, generate cand_b plan. If OOM: reduce batch size, use gradient checkpointing. If K-FAC diverges: add damping, increase regularization.

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: Pipeline works AND H6 not falsified (K-FAC IF still worse than RepSim by >= 5pp)
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If pipeline fails: debug and retry. If H6 falsified: pivot to cand_b.

pilot_phases.name: Core 2x2 Factorial Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Cell A: TRAK standard on data_selection pilot
Cell B: TRAK-C (mean-subtracted) on data_selection pilot; check H2 directional
Cell C: RepSim standard on data_selection pilot
Cell D: RepSim-C on data_selection pilot; check H2 asymmetry
BM25 + k-NN + DDA baselines on data_selection pilot; check H8
tasks.pass_criteria: BM25 LDS < RepSim LDS (H8 directional); all baselines produce valid scores

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: H1 direction confirmed (RepSim > TRAK); H2 direction confirmed (contrastive helps more in param space); H8 direction confirmed (RepSim > BM25). Quantitative thresholds evaluated at full scale.
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If H1 reversed: check implementation bugs first. If H2 asymmetry absent: weaken FM2 narrative. If BM25 > RepSim: restrict scope.

pilot_phases.name: Mechanistic Evidence Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Compute eigenspectrum on Pythia-70M with 100 samples; test H4 and H9
tasks.pass_criteria: Lanczos converges; r_eff(95%) in [256, 1024]; condition number ratio > 100x
tasks.fail_action: If Lanczos slow: reduce to top-200 eigenvalues. If r_eff out of range: document and revise H4.

tasks.pilot_purpose: Run TRAK dim sweep pilot with subset of k values {128, 512, 2048} on 100 samples
tasks.pass_criteria: LDS increases with k; visible saturation trend

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: Eigenspectrum shows clear low-rank structure; TRAK shows saturation trend
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If no low-rank structure: H4 falsified, weaken mechanistic claims. If TRAK keeps improving: H5 falsified, revise signal dilution story.

pilot_phases.name: Framework Extension Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Whitened RepSim pilot on data_selection with 100 samples; test H7 directional
tasks.pass_criteria: Whitened RepSim produces valid scores (no NaN); improvement over standard RepSim on at least 1 task
tasks.fail_action: If NaN: increase Ledoit-Wolf shrinkage. If whitened worse: document negative result; common influence may be near-isotropic (H9 confirms).

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: Whitened attribution is numerically stable and shows improvement direction
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If whitening fails completely: drop H7 from main claims; report as negative result.
